However, a closely affiliated Morris-based passenger carrier exists: School Transportation Leasing Inc (USDOT 4431173) at 312 Liberty St, Morris IL -- 50 power units, 50 drivers, intrastate-only, contact email @yellowbusgroupofamerica.com. The same parent group also runs schoolvangroupofamerica.com ('Empowering Education Through Transportation') and Yellow Bus Group of America. Strong circumstantial evidence these are sister brands under one Morris-IL operator. The target's standalone Inc name is likely a separate IL corporation; couldn't directly verify in IL SOS via public web. Different street address than the FMCSA affiliate.
